final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing e-commerce landing page hero section mockup for a beauty brand named "LUMEA BEAUTY".

Style/medium: needs a clean, bright, airy, feminine aesthetic with floral accents — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must include a three-column hero layout (left: copy column, center: model subject, right: product display), a top navigation header, and a bottom benefit-card row
Subject: must include all of the following:
  Center: young East Asian woman smiling, touching her cheek, holding a dropper bottle of serum
  Left column copy elements:
    - Headline text
    - Subheadline body copy
    - 3 pill-shaped feature badges with small icons: "敏感肌OK" / "高保湿" / "朝晩使える"
    - 3 bullet points with pink checkmarks: "美容成分をしっかり届ける" / "ハリ・ツヤのある印象へ" / "続けやすいシンプルケア"
    - 2 CTA buttons
    - Trust badge strip
  Right column:
    - moisturizing boost serum dropper bottle (product)
    - packaging box
    - 3 floating white rounded-rectangle stat cards with gold accents: "満足度 96%" / "美容成分 5種配合" / "愛用者 12,000人突破"
  Bottom section: 3 horizontal white rounded-rectangle benefit cards with icons: "うるおい" / "透明感" / "使いやすさ"
Scene/backdrop: needs a soft, airy background with purple floral accent elements — exact placement is yours
Lighting/mood: needs a soft, diffused lighting atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a soft pink and white dominant direction with purple flower accents and gold detail touches — exact hex values and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: needs a light, smooth UI surface treatment — exact card sheen and shadow depth is yours
Text (verbatim): must include all of the following verbatim:
  Header: logo wordmark "LUMEA BEAUTY"; nav links "特徴" / "成分" / "お客様の声" / "使い方" / "FAQ"; CTA button "今すぐ試す"
  Hero left: headline "鏡を見るたび、うるおう透明感。"; subheadline "乾燥・くすみが気になる肌に。美容成分を贅沢に配合した、毎日のための集中保湿美容液。"; badges "敏感肌OK" / "高保湿" / "朝晩使える"; bullets "美容成分をしっかり届ける" / "ハリ・ツヤのある印象へ" / "続けやすいシンプルケア"; CTA buttons "初回限定で試してみる >" / "成分をチェック >"; trust badges "送料無料 / 初回限定 / 定期縛りなし"
  Hero right stat cards: "満足度 96%" / "美容成分 5種配合" / "愛用者 12,000人突破"
  Bottom benefit cards: "うるおい" / "透明感" / "使いやすさ"
Constraints: must preserve the three-column hero structure; all 5 nav links visible; all 3 stat cards floating over the product area; all 3 bottom benefit cards in a horizontal row; all verbatim text rendered legibly
Avoid:
